title: Spa and sauna
description: A calm wellness area for rest, warmth, recovery, and private time with family or friends.

services.title: Hammam
services.subtitle: Traditional steam relaxation
services.description: Hammam is a traditional warm steam experience with gentle heat and high humidity. It helps guests slow down, relax the body, and enjoy a quiet wellness ritual.
features: Warm pool or hydromassage area may be available
services.note: Prices, capacity, and extra guest fees may vary by business. Please confirm details before booking.

services.title: Dry sauna
services.subtitle: Classic hot sauna experience
services.description: Dry sauna is a classic wellness option with high temperature and low humidity. It is suitable for guests who enjoy deep warmth, quiet rest, and a traditional sauna atmosphere.
features: Cold plunge pool may be available
services.note: Prices, capacity, and extra guest fees may vary by business. Please confirm details before booking.

services.title: Wet sauna
services.subtitle: Warm humid sauna rest
services.description: Wet sauna combines warmth with higher humidity. It creates a softer sauna feeling and is a good choice for guests who prefer steam, gentle heat, and a relaxing rhythm.
features: Cold plunge pool may be available
services.note: Prices, capacity, and extra guest fees may vary by business. Please confirm details before booking.

booking.title: Booking and details
booking.text: For current prices, available time slots, guest capacity, and service rules, please contact the team before your visit.
